embeds.title: Morimens: Xu Overview #morimens #animehorrorgame #lovecraftianhorro...
embeds.description: "Elegant, alluring-an Eastern 'deity' of fatal charm. Legend has it that when she lowers her fan, you will see the face of your most beloved reflected beneath. Yet legends are merely legends. Pray that her gaze never falls upon you. Once she seeps into your memories like a pervasive night mist, noth
